ToolboxElements.Name: Counter Alpha Upper (2–5 chars)
ToolboxElements.Description: Uppercase alpha counter with a minimum of 2 chars, expandable up to 5 (custom pattern).

ToolboxElements.Name: Counter Alpha3 then Alpha2
ToolboxElements.Description: Composite alpha counter: first 3 lowercase, then 2 lowercase (custom pattern).

ToolboxElements.Name: Counter Alpha Mixed (3 chars)
ToolboxElements.Description: Mixed-case alpha counter with 3 chars: 1 upper + 2 lower (custom pattern).

ToolboxElements.Name: Counter Alpha Upper (3 chars)
ToolboxElements.Description: All-uppercase alpha counter with 3 characters (custom pattern).

ToolboxElements.Name: Counter Alpha Lower (3 chars)
ToolboxElements.Description: All-lowercase alpha counter with 3 characters (custom pattern).

ToolboxElements.Name: Counter Numeric (6 digits, zero-padded)
ToolboxElements.Description: Numeric counter padded to 6 digits (custom pattern).

ToolboxElements.Name: Counter Numeric (3 digits, zero-padded)
ToolboxElements.Description: Numeric counter padded to 3 digits (custom pattern).
